reviews.comment:
Me aceptan en un hotel con mi perrito durante 5 días  a donde vamos el va con nosotros y en "LA YPF" estabamos de paso y me dijeron si quería tomar algo que sea  afuera  MALLLL....

(Translated by Google)
They accepted me in a hotel with my dog ​​for 5 days where we were going, he came with us and at "LA YPF" we were passing through and they asked me if I wanted to have something to eat outside MALLLL....

reviews.comment:
Podrían mejorar el servicio dado que tienen mucha clientela y pocos empleados. 45' para comprar un café a la madrugada (y carísimo) pues solo tienen un empleado para todo. ¡ Un genio de cuatro manos, el muchacho! A esa hora, todo sucio. Pasamos otro día a las 14 hs y una cola terrible para cargar nafta. Inviertan señores y den trabajo que dinero, no les falta!

(Translated by Google)
They could improve their service, given they have a lot of customers and few employees. It took 45 minutes to buy a coffee in the early morning (and it was ridiculously expensive) because they only have one employee for everything. What a four-handed genius, that guy! At that hour, everything was filthy. We went back another day at 2 PM and there was a terrible line to get gas. Invest, gentlemen, and create jobs; you certainly don't lack money!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1a2UzWl9RRRAB
